name: Springerle: (Hard Cookies, Anise Flavor)
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp coarsely crushed anise seeds to sprinkle on top
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and baking powder.
2. Beat the eggs until light and lemon-colored.
3. Add the sugar, beating again.
4. Incorporate the ground anise, lemon rind, and the flour mixture; mix well.
5. Chill the dough for about an hour or until firm enough to handle easily.
6. Roll the dough on a lightly floured cloth-covered board to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
7. Traditionally, use a rolling pin with springerle designs, or cut the dough into small shapes of any kind.
8. Place the pieces on a cookie sheet, spaced about 1/2 inch apart.
9. Sprinkle with anise seed and expose to air overnight.
10. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes.
